[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010110100 5
1 1010000000 2
2 0000000000 a
3 1000000000 1
4 1010110100 5
5 1010000000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

70 07 0110000000 2

47 74 0000000000 a match 2 6 7

26 62 1010110100 5 match 0 4
37 73 1010000000 2 match 1 5
